Royal Quest
Knight of Love Sword

When attacking, has a 20% chance of restoring 9% health in self.
When attacking, the unit removes 2 buffs from 3 random enemies and deals physical damage equal to 10% of their max health. Also, all affected targets take physical damage based on their distance from the unit. The greater the distance, the greater the damage (max: 100800, min: 33264).

Requirements: 98-100
